meta.description: Lucid Commander robotics platform knowledge map

project.name: Lucid Commander
project.brand_promise: Delivering automated cleaning solutions that operate reliably in commercial environments without requiring specialized expertise to manage

phases.name: Foundation
phases.description: Core data models and infrastructure that everything depends on

phases.name: Features
phases.description: Business functionality - all can be developed in parallel

phases.name: User Interactions
phases.description: User actions that mutate system state through UI interactions

users:fleet-teleoperator.description: Multi-role permission system with Owners, Operators, Teleoperators, Fleet Teleoperators, Customer Service, Operations Managers, and Executives

users:customer-service.description: Multi-role permission system with Owners, Operators, Teleoperators, Fleet Teleoperators, Customer Service, Operations Managers, and Executives

platforms:web-platform.name: Web Platform
platforms:web-platform.description: Primary interface with full feature set including Mission Control, Fleet Management, Advanced Diagnostics, and Business Intelligence

platforms:mobile-platform.name: Mobile Platform
platforms:mobile-platform.description: Field operations interface with essential features: Robot Control, Mission Status, Device Health, Emergency Teleoperation, and Push Notifications

platforms:aws-infrastructure.name: AWS Infrastructure
platforms:aws-infrastructure.description: Data and communication backbone using IoT Core, S3, Kinesis, Glue, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, and WebSocket connections

screens:fleet-dashboard.name: Fleet Management Dashboard
screens:fleet-dashboard.description: Real-time fleet status map with device health indicators, active mission assignments, and maintenance alert prioritization

screens:mission-control.name: Mission Control Interface
screens:mission-control.description: Click and Clean interface for waypoint-based mission planning with autonomous pathfinding and scheduling

screens:device-diagnostics.name: Device Diagnostics
screens:device-diagnostics.description: Individual device analysis with mission history, component health monitoring, and predictive maintenance triggers

screens:teleoperation-interface.name: Teleoperation Interface
screens:teleoperation-interface.description: Real-time robot control over internet with live camera feed, telemetry overlay, and emergency intervention (<200ms latency)

screens:business-intelligence.name: Business Intelligence Dashboard
screens:business-intelligence.description: Operational metrics including flight time analytics, mission completion rates, fleet utilization, and performance trends

components:fleet-status-map.name: Fleet Status Map
components:fleet-status-map.description: Real-time fleet status map with device health indicators, active mission assignments, and maintenance alert prioritization

components:camera-feed.name: Live Camera Feed
components:camera-feed.description: Real-time robot control over internet with live camera feed, telemetry overlay, and emergency intervention (<200ms latency)

components:device-analyzer.name: Device Analysis Tools
components:device-analyzer.description: Individual device analysis with mission history, component health monitoring, and predictive maintenance triggers

components:websocket-manager.name: WebSocket Manager
components:websocket-manager.description: Manages real-time websocket connections for telemetry

components:edge-ai-analyzer.name: Edge AI Analyzer
components:edge-ai-analyzer.description: Performs AI analysis at the edge for maintenance predictions

components:maintenance-scheduler.name: Maintenance Scheduler
components:maintenance-scheduler.description: Schedules maintenance tasks based on predictions

features:real-time-telemetry.name: Real-Time Telemetry
features:real-time-telemetry.description: Live position, altitude, battery status, environmental data, and mission progress with 5-10s freshness

features:predictive-maintenance.name: Predictive Maintenance
features:predictive-maintenance.description: Edge-based component health analysis with maintenance alerts and automated scheduling recommendations

features:natural-language-interface.name: Natural Language Interface
features:natural-language-interface.description: Text-to-command processing and voice command integration for hands-free operation

features:analytics-system.name: Analytics
features:analytics-system.description: Comprehensive analytics platform providing real-time insights into fleet performance, mission effectiveness, and operational metrics. Enables data-driven decision making through advanced reporting, trend analysis, and predictive analytics capabilities.

schema:robot-fleet-model.name: Robot Fleet Model
schema:robot-fleet-model.description: Window washing drones and pressure washing rovers with operational data

schema:mission-data-model.name: Mission Data Model
schema:mission-data-model.description: Mission planning, execution, and completion data

schema:user-permissions-model.name: User Permissions Model
schema:user-permissions-model.description: Role-based access control and company segmentation

schema:maintenance-order-model.name: Maintenance Orders Model
schema:maintenance-order-model.description: Parts ordering and maintenance workflow tracking

ui_components:dark-theme.name: Dark Theme
ui_components:dark-theme.description: Professional dark theme with rgba(18, 18, 20, 1) background optimized for extended operational use

ui_components:glassmorphism-style.name: Glass Morphism Design
ui_components:glassmorphism-style.description: Glass overlay design system with backdrop blur effects for modern interface aesthetics

ui_components:status-indicators.name: Status Indicator System
ui_components:status-indicators.description: Color-coded status system using error red #FF0000, primary blue #0076FE, and secondary blue #33E2FF

ui_components:button-system.name: Interactive Button Components
ui_components:button-system.description: White-based interactive elements with transparent overlays and border highlights for clear action feedback

ui_components:data-visualization.name: Data Visualization Components
ui_components:data-visualization.description: Chart and graph components optimized for real-time telemetry and analytics display

ui_components:responsive-layout.name: Responsive Layout System
ui_components:responsive-layout.description: Mobile-first responsive design system with progressive web app capabilities

actions:emergency-stop-robot.name: Emergency Stop Robot
actions:emergency-stop-robot.description: Immediately halt all robot operations with fail-safe activation

actions:assign-mission.name: Assign Mission to Robot
actions:assign-mission.description: Assign waypoint-based cleaning mission to specific robot

actions:navigate-to-diagnostics.name: Navigate to Device Diagnostics
actions:navigate-to-diagnostics.description: Navigation action to device diagnostics screen

actions:approve-maintenance-order.name: Approve Maintenance Order
actions:approve-maintenance-order.description: Approve pending maintenance order for parts procurement

actions:export-analytics-report.name: Export Analytics Report
actions:export-analytics-report.description: Generate and download analytics report in specified format
